title: pseuduvaria costata
intro: Pseuduvaria costata, also known as the Pseuduvaria costata plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to New Guinea and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including the relief of respiratory issues and skin conditions. Pseuduvaria costata is often prepared for use in herbal medicine by making a decoction or infusion of the plant's leaves and stems.
